prompt: Low-angle fashion campaign photograph of a confident model holding a large product very close to the camera, exaggerated perspective with the hand and product dominating the foreground, full-body pose visible in the background, wide stance, dynamic posture, clean pure white studio background, high-key lighting, sharp focus on product, slight depth of field on the model, bold colorful outfit with strong contrast tones, modern beauty advertising aesthetic, ultra-clean composition, commercial studio photography, glossy packaging detail visible, crisp shadows
promptEn: Low-angle fashion campaign photograph of a confident model holding a large product very close to the camera, exaggerated perspective with the hand and product dominating the foreground, full-body pose visible in the background, wide stance, dynamic posture, clean pure white studio background, high-key lighting, sharp focus on product, slight depth of field on the model, bold colorful outfit with strong contrast tones, modern beauty advertising aesthetic, ultra-clean composition, commercial studio photography, glossy packaging detail visible, crisp shadows
promptZh: 低角度时尚大片摄影，一位自信的模特将一个巨大的 产品 靠近镜头，夸张的视角使手部和产品占据前景，背景中可见全身姿态，双脚分开，动态姿势，干净纯白的摄影棚背景，高调布光，焦点清晰对准产品，模特处有轻微景深，色彩大胆且对比强烈的服装，现代美妆广告美学，构图极简，商业摄影棚摄影，可见光泽感包装细节，阴影清晰锐利
